sections.label: Verse 1
lines: An lak phat khin ta hi, Kuai khin zota hi,
Khris Topa’n hong sam a ni bei baih ding
hi;
Hong sawl bang sem meng in, An-late pawm in,
Tha nuamtak sem in la an-late huh
in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: An lak phat khin ta hi, sep theih lai sem in;
A hun bei han han hi, Tuni-in
sem in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: An lak phat khin ta hi, Kihei hei kei in,
An late sepna aw huih in hong puak
khin;
Lungduai takin sem in, Khawm in anvui teng,
Kham leh zang mun khempeuh ni hong tum
mateng.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: An lak phat khin ta hi, Tuni’n kua kuan ding?
An late huh in buhlomte
kuan pua ding;
Na kisep theih sun hun, Hong bei baih ding hi,
Na zawh ciang Topa’n
“Pha hi” hong ci ding hi.
